bots.title: POGY | Multipurpose Discord Bot
bots.description: A powerful all-in-one Discord bot with 1,333+ commands.
bots.full_description:
A feature-rich all-in-one Discord bot designed to give server owners complete control over their community. With over 1,333 commands across 41+ main commands and 25+ subcommands, it covers everything you need in one place.


The bot includes a full Music System with play, queue, loop, filters, and autoplay support. Server security is handled through Anti-Nuke Protection with whitelist, vanity guard, and punishment systems, alongside AutoMod with anti-link, anti-mention, and blacklist word filtering.


Community engagement is covered with a Giveaway system, Warning & Case System, Birthday & Profile Cards, a Ticket System, and Welcome, Verification & Reaction Roles.


What sets it apart is the Live Web Dashboard — a full guild control panel letting server admins manage everything from a browser without needing Discord commands.
